description: Minimal verifiable log format for agent decisions. Record tamper-proof judgment, delegation, termination, and verification events using JCS and Ed25519.

security.sensitive_data: This skill does not collect or transmit any data. Private keys are never hardcoded and should be provided by the user's secure environment.
security.external_dependencies: Relies on the 'jep-protocol' PyPI package. Users are advised to verify its source and integrity.
security.recommendations: Use in an isolated environment. Never share private keys in prompts.
